Ketu in the second to Mercury, the native will have ceaseless troubles from his
cousins on the paternal side. But he will win them over as Ketu is conjunct
Jupiter in exaltation.

27,4 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
Jupiter. Further, the three houses behind Jupiter are also vacant. This denotes
that the native will have no brothers or sisters born after him. During the
second round, when Jupiter comes to Gemini occupied by the Moon and Rahu
i.e. about the age of I2 '!; 7 ~ I9 the native will have a great calamitous time.
If he overcomes the same, he will live up to 45 or 50 years of age.
